Notice Of Motion And Motion To Change Venue
Off Calendar Feb-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DANIEL WIERSGALLA'S Motion to Change Venue from San Francisco Superior Court, to Trinity County Superior Court, State of California. Appearances: Ashley Clower, Esq., of Law Offices of Stawicki & Maples, (916) 363-2889, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Peter Laurie, Esq. of Andrada & Associates, (510) 287-4160, appearing for Defendant Daniel Harvy Wiersgalla and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Denied. Failed to carry burden to show inconvenience to witnesses. Order signed in Open Court. (302/PHA/JW) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado; Court Reporter: Connie J. Parchman, CSR 6137
